mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_support_tickets_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, order_id, subject, category, priority, state_id, flow_id, assigned_agent_id, description, resolved_at, reopen_count, hours_open, created_at ) SELECT st.id, st.tenant, NOW(), st.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(u.email, ''), st.order_id, st.subject, st.category, st.priority, st.state_id, st.flow_id, st.assigned_agent_id, st.description, st.resolved_at, COALESCE(st.reopen_count, 0), EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - st.created_time)) / 3600, st.created_time FROM hm_support.support_tickets st LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON st.customer_id = u.id
